description: partitionInvocationId 贯穿的反例:claim 阶段没存 invocation id(state 不带)→ renew 出向 body 不应凭空捏造一个。SDK 要么带 claim 时拿到的真 id、要么不带——绝不发一个 SDK 自造的 id(平台 CAS 会 mismatch → 409)。这条锁住「该带没带 / 不该带乱带」两侧:无 state.partitionInvocationId 时,renew body 不含该 key。

then.sdkExpectedAction: call renew with a body that omits partitionInvocationId (NON_NULL) when none was stored at claim, rather than inventing one
sdkMustNot: fabricate a partitionInvocationId the platform never issued
